reason: Manual review required: HOLD-class primitive(s): System Transfer above threshold; declared SOL outflow 5000000000 lamports exceeds threshold.

findings.label: System Transfer above threshold
findings.detail: System Transfer of 5000000000 lamports exceeds threshold 1000000000.
findings.mapsToLoss: Direct SOL outflow from the signer above the configured threshold (default 1 SOL = 1,000,000,000 lamports).
